Current WARNs

Worker Adjustment and Retraining Notification (WARN) Table

Use the table below to find the most recent WARNs all the way back to 2008. The table allows you to search through the table, search files, sort columns, view up to 100 entries at a time, and export the data in the table. If you have any questions please let us know.  You can find the legend and contact information at the bottom of this page.

Employers wishing to submit a WARN or Non-WARN should send the notification through the Employer Portal .

Note: NAICs and SOC codes are updated periodically at the national level to accurately reflect industries and occupations as they evolve. To review the latest information please visit this link for information on NAICS codes and this link for SOC codes.

Sign up to receive alerts about this page

Monaco Coach Elkhart & Nappanee 1430 7/17/2008 9/17/2008 336213 Motor Home Manufacturing CL
Republic Airways Indianapolis 500 Nationwide 7/14/2008 9/10/2008 481111 Air Transportation LO
American Airlines, Inc. Indianapolis 4 7/14/2008 9/5/2008 481111 Air Transportation LO
Mitsubishi Heavy Equipment Climate Control, Inc Franklin 60 7/10/2008 9/12/2008 333999 Manufacturing CL

Legend

  • W = WARN Notice
  • CL = Closure
  • LO = Layoff
  • TR = Transfer
  • RH = Reduction in Hours
  • Cond. = Conditional

Indianapolis, IN 46204

Contact for News Media


DWDmedia@dwd.IN.gov

Equal Opportunity is the Law. (La Igualdad De Oportunidad Es La Ley.)
DWD is an equal opportunity employer that administers equal opportunity programs. Free auxiliary aids and services are available upon request to individuals with disabilities (TDD/TTY Number: 1-800-743-3333). Free language interpretation and translation services are also available upon request.
